notes: Machine-readable mirror of the codebase. Read at every session start; update immediately on any structural code change (new module, changed dependency, changed GDOS mapping). See references/pkg_schema.md.

nodes.functional_summary: Immutable 2D vector algebra primitive (encapsulated geometry). Pure math, no system logic. Operations return new records; never mutate operands.
Deterministic seedable PRNG (mulberry32). Generator state carried as an explicit value and threaded by callers; no hidden global entropy. Guarantees replayable design tooling and agent simulation.

Fixed-timestep accumulator. Banks variable real delta and emits a whole number of fixed simulation steps (FIXED_STEP_SECONDS = 1/60). Clamps to MAX_FRAME_SECONDS to prevent spiral-of-death. Pure value state.
Immutable root state tree GameState<TWorld> plus InputFrame. Core owns tick/clock/rng/input; gameplay-specific data lives in the abstract world slot so core is decoupled from systems and content.
The System<TWorld> contract: a pure step(state)=>state function for one fixed step. Systems are stateless between frames and never read another system's internals.

Single source of truth. Holds current + previous snapshots and is the only place the current snapshot is swapped (commit). Optional deep-freeze on commit catches accidental mutation in tests. Idempotent commit.

Deterministic Read->Process->Emit runtime loop. tick(realDeltaSeconds) reads the current snapshot from StateManager, calls Clock.advance() once to get a whole fixed-step count, runs the ordered System pipeline once per step (tick incremented by exactly 1 per step), and commits every resulting snapshot through StateManager. Commits even on a zero-step tick to persist the banked clock accumulator (dm-0007). Exposes interpolationAlpha for the renderer. Generic over TWorld; no gameplay assumptions.

Deterministic SDLC drift gate. Dependency-free Node runner that checks pkg-covers-src, pkg-not-stale, no-placeholders, handoff-fresh, backlog-integrity, stage-consistency (vs meta/active_task.json), and (manual) tests-green against live repo state. CLI + Stop-hook modes; fails open on internal error, loud on findings. Reads policy from tools/sdlc/sdlc.yaml.

SDLC Stage Manager. Tracks the active task slice through the nine-stage loop and persists it to meta/active_task.json (live) + meta/runs/ (archive) for mid-slice resumability. Enforces stage order; records acceptance-criteria state. CLI: start/advance/criterion/status/done/abort.

Declarative SDLC gate policy: enforcement level (warn|block) and per-gate severity/enabled/when overrides. Override-only over gate.js built-in defaults, so a malformed line degrades safely toward enforcement.
SessionStart hook. Deterministically injects the Reboot-Lifecycle reminder plus a live summary of meta/handoff_latest.json into context at every session start. Fails soft if the handoff is missing.
